text_col.text_content: {"text":"Which region has the highest customer count?\r\n","type":"text","content":{"text":"Which region has the highest customer count?\r\n"}}
The Northeast region has the highest customer count of 193,095.

{"text":"show me keydriver of Profit ('Profit' is a metric) by Subcategory ('Subcategory' is an attribute) \n","type":"token","content":{"text":"show me keydriver of ###0### by ###1### \n","extra":{"placeholders":[{"insertText":"Profit","id":"4C051DB611D3E877C000B3B2D86C964F"},{"insertText":"Subcategory","id":"8D679D4F11D3E4981000E787EC6DE8A4"}],"usedItemsMap":{},"usedItemsObjectString":"[[\"Profit\",{\"label\":\"Profit\",\"insertText\":\"Profit\",\"extra\":{\"id\":\"4C051DB611D3E877C000B3B2D86C964F\"}}],[\"Subcategory\",{\"label\":\"Subcategory\",\"insertText\":\"Subcategory\",\"extra\":{\"id\":\"8D679D4F11D3E4981000E787EC6DE8A4\"}}]]"}}}

The overall average of Profit is **$220,568**. The **Video Equipment** subcategory has the most significant impact on the increase of the overall average of Profit, as it increases the overall average by **+13.9%**, and when excluding this subcategory, the overall average of Profit decreases to **$189,844**. On the other hand, the **Country** subcategory has the largest impact on the decrease of the overall average of Profit, as it decreases the overall average by **-4.2%**, and when excluding this subcategory, the overall average of Profit increases to **$229,866**.

{"text":"show me the heatmap of Profit ('Profit' is a metric) by Category ('Category' is an attribute) and Region ('Region' is an attribute) \n","type":"token","content":{"text":"show me the heatmap of ###0### by ###1### and ###2### \n","extra":{"placeholders":[{"insertText":"Profit","id":"4C051DB611D3E877C000B3B2D86C964F"},{"insertText":"Category","id":"8D679D3711D3E4981000E787EC6DE8A4"},{"insertText":"Region","id":"8D679D4B11D3E4981000E787EC6DE8A4"}],"usedItemsMap":{},"usedItemsObjectString":"[[\"Profit\",{\"label\":\"Profit\",\"insertText\":\"Profit\",\"extra\":{\"id\":\"4C051DB611D3E877C000B3B2D86C964F\"}}],[\"Category\",{\"label\":\"Category\",\"insertText\":\"Category\",\"extra\":{\"id\":\"8D679D3711D3E4981000E787EC6DE8A4\"}}],[\"Region\",{\"label\":\"Region\",\"insertText\":\"Region\",\"extra\":{\"id\":\"8D679D4B11D3E4981000E787EC6DE8A4\"}}]]"}}}

The heatmap of Profit by Category and Region shows the following insights:

- Books category has the highest Profit in the Northeast region with $139,932, followed by the South region with $86,806.
- Electronics category has the highest Profit in the Northeast region with $1,053,305, followed by the South region with $653,980.
- Movies category has the highest Profit in the Northeast region with $63,071, followed by the South region with $38,841.
- Music category has the highest Profit in the Northeast region with $44,425, followed by the South region with $27,329.
- Overall, the Electronics category has the highest total Profit of $4,289,603, followed by Books category with $569,278.


Please note that the visualization result only shows a subset of the data.

{"text":"show me the trend of Revenue ('Revenue' is a metric) based on Year ('Year' is an attribute) \n","type":"token","content":{"text":"show me the trend of ###0### based on ###1### \n","extra":{"placeholders":[{"insertText":"Revenue","id":"4C05177011D3E877C000B3B2D86C964F"},{"insertText":"Year","id":"8D679D5111D3E4981000E787EC6DE8A4"}],"usedItemsMap":{},"usedItemsObjectString":"[[\"Revenue\",{\"label\":\"Revenue\",\"insertText\":\"Revenue\",\"extra\":{\"id\":\"4C05177011D3E877C000B3B2D86C964F\"}}],[\"Year\",{\"label\":\"Year\",\"insertText\":\"Year\",\"extra\":{\"id\":\"8D679D5111D3E4981000E787EC6DE8A4\"}}]]"}}}

Based on the trend analysis of Revenue from 2014 to 2016, the Revenue has shown an upward trend. The Revenue has increased by approximately 72.49% during this period. Please note that the actual time unit of the attribute is in years, and the trend analysis is based on the available data.

{"text":"What are the top 5 categories by Revenue ('Revenue' is a metric)?\n","type":"token","content":{"text":"What are the top 5 categories by ###0###?\n","extra":{"placeholders":[{"insertText":"Revenue","id":"4C05177011D3E877C000B3B2D86C964F"}],"usedItemsMap":{},"usedItemsObjectString":"[[\"Revenue\",{\"label\":\"Revenue\",\"insertText\":\"Revenue\",\"extra\":{\"id\":\"4C05177011D3E877C000B3B2D86C964F\"}}]]"}}}

The top 5 categories by Revenue are:
- Electronics with a total Revenue of $24,391,303
- Movies with a total Revenue of $4,098,943
- Music with a total Revenue of $3,893,367
- Books with a total Revenue of $2,640,094
